raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint regarding American Expresss refusal to assist with a charge related to defective merchandise and merchant failure.

On or about XX/XX/year>, I purchased a sofa set from XXXX XXXX XXXX in XXXX, North Carolina, totaling {$7000.00}. The furniture developed material and manufacturing defects shortly after delivery, including discoloration and premature leather wear across multiple sections. 

I contacted XXXX XXXX XXXX, and the merchant acknowledged the defect and promised a replacement. Over several months, I was repeatedly told the item was out of stock and to continue waiting. I relied on these assurances in good faith and therefore did not immediately dispute the charge. 

XXXX XXXX XXXX has since declared bankruptcy and closed stores, and no replacement or refund was ever provided. The transaction remains unresolved. 

I contacted American Express multiple times to request assistance due to merchant failure and insolvency, but American Express declined to help, citing the passage of time, despite the issue being ongoing and caused by the merchants repeated delays and eventual bankruptcy. 

I am requesting that American Express review this matter under merchant failure/insolvency protections and provide appropriate relief or reconsideration, given the unresolved defective merchandise and the merchants inability to fulfill its obligations..
